response.justification: Candidate has 17+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and AI-agent tooling, with solid fundamentals in TDD, CI/CD, and distributed systems (notably high-throughput work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or growth measurement systems — the core of this Principal IC6 role. Title history is mostly Senior/Staff rather than Principal-level, and there is no evidence of leading multi-team, cross-product platform initiatives at enterprise scale.
strengths: Long tenure with polyglot full-stack experience (TS/Node, D, C/C++, Java) and low-latency systems background
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling aligns with AI-first growth systems
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing infrastructure
Lacks evidence of telemetry/metrics platform work or statistical/experimental analysis at scale
No clear track record of Principal-level cross-team influence or multi-workstream platform leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and polyglot scale experience
No evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team platform leadership
